decisions: D98: V0 publicly commits only to Git diff -> audit.json + audit.html; change_audit.review keeps an artifact-general long-term direction; non-diff types begin as ReviewResult-only and become formal audit profiles only after adapter, anchor, eval baseline, and renderer profile exist.
D98 blueprint clarification: repository-level project blueprint must describe the long-term artifact-general product direction rather than treating Git diff as the permanent product boundary.
D99: finalize stages audit.json and audit.html, completes all validation, then publishes the formal artifact pair; hard failures must not leave a half-published report.
evidence.scope: documentation, plan, blueprint, and design assets only; no implementation migration
